nodes.source: Awramik, Czakon, Freitas, Weiglein 2004. PRD 69, 053006. Form factor kappa_Z for m_t=172.57, m_H=125.2.
nodes.notes: Corrected from v0 = 1.0370 which was too high. kappa_Z = 1 + (c_t * m_t^2/M_Z^2 + c_H * ln(m_H/M_Z)) * alpha/(4*pi*sin2*cos2). At m_t=172.57, m_H=125.2: kappa_Z = 1.0353.

nodes.source: Non-universal vertex+box corrections to Z decay. Computed from m_t, m_H, M_Z. Degrassi et al. 2014.
nodes.notes: Additional correction to Gamma_Z beyond rho and kappa_Z. Gamma = Gamma_0 * rho * (1 + delta_vb). Negative — reduces width.

nodes.source: Mixed QCD-EW corrections to Z hadronic width. O(alpha_s/pi) + O(alpha_s^2/pi^2) terms.
nodes.notes: Total QCD correction factor is (1 + delta_qcd) for quark channels. Includes alpha_s/pi + 1.41*(alpha_s/pi)^2 - 12.8*(alpha_s/pi)^3.

nodes.source: Final-state QED radiation correction for Z -> l+l-. 3*alpha/(4*pi) = 0.00173.
nodes.notes: Multiplicative correction: Gamma_l *= (1 + 3*alpha/(4*pi)). Small but needed for sub-percent.
